examples: such erratic behavior was out of the way for him

meanings.definition: in a remote location or at a distance from the usual route
examples: the restaurant is top-notch, but a little out of the way
the mob boss wanted his rival out of the way
I'm so relieved that my midterm is out of the way

meanings.definition: so as not to obstruct or hinder
examples: put that box out of the way so that no one trips on it
